rule "R0"

when

    T1(f2 != false, $b0_1_0 : f2, $b0_1_1 : f0)
    $p0_2 : T2(f2 != "beta", f3 == false, $b0_2_0 : f1, $b0_2_1 : f1, f1 == false)

    modify($p0_2) { setF1(true) }

rule "R1"

when
    $p1_0 : T0(f1 <= "", f1 < "zz", $b1_0_0 : f1)
then
    insert(new T2(-3.0, $p1_0.isF2(), $b1_0_0, false));
end
rule "R2"

when
    $p2_0 : T0($b2_0_0 : f0, $b2_0_1 : f0, f2 == false)
    $p2_1 : T0(f2 != true)

    modify($p2_0) { setF2(true), setF0($b2_0_1) }

rule "R3"

no-loop
when
    T1(f3 != false, $b3_0_0 : f2, $b3_0_1 : f1)

end
rule "R4"

when

    $p4_1 : T0(f2 == $b4_0_0, $b4_1_0 : f1)
